title: General Medicine (Specialist Degree Program) — English Medium, V. Zelman Institute of Medicine and Psychology / Institute of Medicine and Medical Technologies

title: Lechebnoye Delo (General Medicine), Medical Institute
medium: English (years 1-3), transitioning to Russian-medium clinical instruction from year 4
feeNotes: A recurring ~RUB 291,878/year figure appears consistently across multiple independent consultancy sites but was not found on syktsu.ru itself — omitted per exhaustive-then-omit rule pending official confirmation.

title: General Medicine (Institute of Medicine)
medium: Russian (1-year preparatory course for foreign students precedes the main program)
feeNotes: An alternate $9,100/year figure also appears on the same official page, possibly for a different cohort/year — $9,450 used as primary per most recent citation.

title: Bachelor of Medicine / Master of Medicine (Medicine Programme) — nonstandard Bachelor+Master structure, approximated to MBBS-equivalent
feeNotes: 11-semester Bachelor of Medicine (3yr) + Master of Medicine (~2.5yr), fully online with clinical placements at partner teaching hospitals. Only single-sourced fee figure (~EUR 19,500/yr) found — omitted per exhaustive-then-omit rule.
